=== standalone
# VDivider not connected — │ characters fill the inner column.
widget: vdivider
width: 8
height: 5
===
╔══════╗
║│     ║
║│     ║
║│     ║
╚══════╝

=== standalone_tall
# VDivider standalone, taller window.
widget: vdivider
width: 8
height: 7
===
╔══════╗
║│     ║
║│     ║
║│     ║
║│     ║
║│     ║
╚══════╝

=== connected
# VDivider Connected=true — junction chars would appear at top/bottom borders
# when placed in a multi-column layout. Standalone here still renders │.
widget: vdivider
connected: true
width: 8
height: 5
===
╔╤═════╗
║│     ║
║│     ║
║│     ║
╚╧═════╝
